name: Social Hook
description: TikTok-first scroll-stoppers: 6-15s, 9:16, every frame engineered to defeat the swipe. Built around the first-3-second rule (retention gate) — pattern interrupt + curiosity gap + sound shock loaded into the opening beats. The hook is the entire product; the rest of the clip is just delivery on the promise. Optimized for completion-rate and watch-loop, not for narrative. Hook angle (gatekeep / skeptic / fail / visual-shock / transformation-tease) is the primary axis of variation; everything else (subject, niche, voice) flexes.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter — 1-3 keyframes max. The single most important frame is frame 0 (the thumbnail / first-glance frame). Optimize that one ruthlessly; others can be looser.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter, 5s clips. Most hooks are 1 clip (6s) or 2 clips (10-12s). generate_audio: false — sound is layered in composition.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2. Optional — many hooks are visual+SFX-only. When present: short, punchy, lands inside the first 1.5s. Conversational, not corporate.
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1 + HormoziCaptions or BoldImpactCaptions. Text overlay is expected on TikTok — at least one bold sans-serif word/phrase appearing with motion at 0.3-0.7s.
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — single track with a hard hit/drop at the hook resolve frame (typically 1.5-2s). Or strategic silence into a single stab. Sound is 50% of the impact.

constants.structure: 0-0.3s attention grab → 0.3-1.5s curiosity build → 1.5-3s commitment moment → rest is payoff
constants.audioRule: audio starts within first 0.5s, never silent-then-add

variationAxes: hook angle (gatekeep / skeptic / fail / visual-shock / curiosity / transformation-tease / direct-address)
first-frame stimulus (impossible-physics / extreme-close-up / freeze-frame-break / glitch / cute-overload / reaction-face)
voice presence (silent+SFX / single-line VO / direct-address question / ASMR-whisper)
text overlay style (HORMOZI-shout / minimal-question / command-word like WAIT/LOOK/STOP)
category (comedy / educational / satisfying-ASMR / transformation / BTS / reaction / storytime / lifestyle)
doNotCopyLiterally: Specific hook text, exact timing milliseconds, niche subject. The pattern (interrupt → gap → commit) is the reusable part. Hook lines like 'WAIT FOR IT' are dead clichés in 2026 — borrow the timing structure, write fresh copy.
referenceNotes: No reference required — hooks are pure pattern. If the user provides a brand / person / product reference, treat it as a regular reference (apply the named-entity gate from AGENTS.md rule #3). Otherwise, the AI is free to invent visuals.
